# Carat Cloud

> The world's most sophisticated cloud ecosystem for diamond houses, jewelry artisans, and global retailers.

Carat Cloud is a premium business suite and SaaS platform purpose-built for the diamond and jewelry industry. It combines a full-featured jewelry POS and ERP system with next-generation AI and cloud tools for inventory management, customer relationships, pricing intelligence, invoicing, catalogs, AR visualization, CAD design, AI-powered marketing, RFID tracking, analytics, and digital storefronts.

## Core Business Suite

- **Product Management**: Complete jewelry and diamond inventory management with detailed attributes, images, and categorization
- **Customer Management**: Customer database with purchase history, preferences, and relationship tracking
- **CRM**: Full customer relationship management for nurturing leads, managing follow-ups, and tracking interactions
- **Invoicing**: Professional invoice generation, billing, and payment tracking for wholesale and retail
- **Point of Sale (POS)**: Premium jewelry POS system for in-store and remote transactions
- **Sales History**: Comprehensive transaction records and sales analytics
- **Purchase Management**: Track vendor purchases, cost of goods, and supplier relationships
- **Labels & Tagging**: Product labeling, barcode/QR generation, and tagging workflows
- **Memos**: Consignment memo management for diamond and jewelry trade
- **Reports**: Business intelligence reports across sales, inventory, margins, and performance
- **Learning Center**: Built-in knowledge base and tutorials for onboarding and training

## Intelligence & Innovation Suite

- **Neural Pricing Arbitrage**: Real-time pricing engine synced with global diamond bourses and precious metal exchanges
- **Cinematic AR Visualization**: Spatial rendering for try-on experiences with hyper-realistic light refraction
- **Integrated Bespoke CAD Studio**: In-platform 3D jewelry design with casting and sourcing workflows
- **Generative Vision Studio**: AI-powered conversion of rough gemstone photos into cinematic marketing assets
- **Omniscient RFID Control**: Sub-millimeter precision tracking across global supply chains
- **Digital Catalogs**: Shareable high-fidelity lookbooks for wholesale and private clients
- **Historical Ledger**: Immutable provenance records for every gemstone
- **Precision Intelligence**: Executive dashboards for sales history, purchase trends, and product cycles
- **Global SEO & Flagship Builder**: AI-powered bespoke digital boutiques synced with cloud inventory

## Pricing

Carat Cloud offers the lowest pricing in the market for comparable jewelry and diamond industry software. The company's mission is not to maximize revenue from software fees but to grow customers' businesses. This makes it accessible to small jewelers, independent designers, and large diamond houses alike.

## Use Cases

- Diamond houses managing large inventories across multiple locations
- Jewelry retailers needing a modern POS and CRM system
- Wholesale dealers needing real-time pricing and market intelligence
- Jewelry designers requiring integrated CAD-to-production workflows
- Brands building SEO-optimized e-commerce storefronts
- Businesses tracking consignment memos and vendor purchases
- Retailers wanting AR try-on experiences for customers
